verification.frontend_typecheck: passed: cd apps/frontend && npx tsc -p tsconfig.json
verification.app_settings_tests: passed: cd apps/frontend && npm test -- App.test.tsx components/SettingsPanel.test.tsx
verification.reader_examples_wordpack_tests: passed: cd apps/frontend && npm test -- ArticleImportPanel.test.tsx ArticleListPanel.test.tsx ExampleListPanel.test.tsx WordPackListPanel.modal.test.tsx WordPackListPanel.guest-mode.test.tsx
verification.wordpack_detail_tests: passed: cd apps/frontend && npm test -- WordPackPanel.test.tsx WordPackListPanel.modal.test.tsx components/wordpack/OverviewSection.test.tsx
verification.route_shelves_tests: passed: cd apps/frontend && npm test -- app/routes.test.ts pages/ShelvesPage/ShelvesPage.test.tsx
verification.frontend_build: passed: cd apps/frontend && npm run build
